tasks.name: Analyze NeoForge Registry API & Behavior
tasks.description:
Thoroughly analyze Registry.java, MappedRegistry.java, and BaseMappedRegistry.java from NeoForge 1.21 sources (F:	emp\spark-core-test
eoforge-21.1.95-minecraft-sources
et
eoforged
eoforgeegistries\) to compile a comprehensive list of all public methods and their expected behaviors. This list will serve as the specification for DynamicAwareRegistry.
tasks.notes: This foundational analysis is critical for ensuring API compatibility.
tasks.implementationGuide: Read the source code. Document method signatures, return types, typical usage patterns, and any special conditions or error handling. Pay attention to methods related to object lifecycle, retrieval, iteration, and tagging.
tasks.verificationCriteria: A detailed document or internal checklist of all relevant Registry API methods and their observed/documented behavior is produced and internally reviewed.
tasks.analysisResult: Refined plan for DynamicAwareRegistry: Ensure full Registry API compatibility by analyzing NeoForge sources (Registry.java, MappedRegistry.java, BaseMappedRegistry.java). Implement all missing methods in DynamicAwareRegistry.kt. Unify registration logic to be game-phase aware, and ensure all registration paths return DeferredHolder.
tasks.summary: 对Registry.java, MappedRegistry.java, 和 BaseMappedRegistry.java 进行了详细分析，梳理了所有公开方法签名、预期行为、内部数据结构以及关键机制（如Holders、Tags、生命周期、序列化、NeoForge扩展如Callbacks、Aliases、DataMaps）。这些信息将作为DynamicAwareRegistry实现API兼容性的基础规范。

tasks.name: Implement Missing Registry Methods in DynamicAwareRegistry
tasks.description: Based on the analysis from 'Analyze NeoForge Registry API & Behavior', implement all missing net.minecraft.core.Registry interface methods in cn.solarmoon.spark_core.registry.dynamic.DynamicAwareRegistry.kt. Methods should correctly delegate to internalRegistry or operate on dynamicEntries as appropriate, ensuring thread safety using the existing ReadWriteLock.

relatedFiles.description: Main class for implementing registry methods.

tasks.implementationGuide: Iterate through the method list from the analysis task. For each method, determine if its logic should primarily concern internalRegistry (static entries), dynamicEntries, or a combination. Implement the logic, ensuring proper locking (read or write lock). Examples: getOptional(RL), getKey(T), keySet(), entrySet(), holders(), tags(), getHolder(RL), getHolderOrThrow(ResourceKey), wrapAsHolder(T). Also consider lifecycle methods like freeze(), isFrozen(), createRegistrationLookup().
tasks.verificationCriteria: All methods from the Registry interface (as identified in the analysis task) are implemented in DynamicAwareRegistry.kt. Code compiles, and a peer review confirms correct delegation and locking strategies.
tasks.analysisResult: Refined plan for DynamicAwareRegistry: Ensure full Registry API compatibility by analyzing NeoForge sources (Registry.java, MappedRegistry.java, BaseMappedRegistry.java). Implement all missing methods in DynamicAwareRegistry.kt. Unify registration logic to be game-phase aware, and ensure all registration paths return DeferredHolder.

tasks.name: Implement Game Phase Detection Mechanism
tasks.description: Research and implement a reliable mechanism within the Spark Core framework to determine the current game registration phase (e.g., before static registration, during static registration events, after static registration/runtime). This mechanism will be used by DynamicAwareRegistry to guide its registration logic.

relatedFiles.description: Consumer of the game phase detection.
Proposed new class for tracking game phases, or integrate into an existing suitable core component.

tasks.implementationGuide: Investigate NeoForge events (e.g., RegisterEvent, NewRegistryEvent, specific ModLoader state changes) or other reliable indicators. Implement a helper class or a method (e.g., GamePhaseTracker.isStaticRegistrationAllowed()) that returns the current phase status. This might involve subscribing to NeoForge's event bus. The implementation should be placed in an appropriate shared location if not solely used by DynamicAwareRegistry.
tasks.verificationCriteria: The implemented mechanism can correctly report whether static registration is currently allowed/appropriate, verifiable through logging or debug breakpoints during different game startup stages.
tasks.analysisResult: Refined plan for DynamicAwareRegistry: Ensure full Registry API compatibility by analyzing NeoForge sources (Registry.java, MappedRegistry.java, BaseMappedRegistry.java). Implement all missing methods in DynamicAwareRegistry.kt. Unify registration logic to be game-phase aware, and ensure all registration paths return DeferredHolder.

tasks.name: Unify Registration Logic and DeferredHolder Return
tasks.description: Modify or create registration methods in DynamicAwareRegistry.kt (e.g., enhancing 'register' and 'registerDynamic') to: 1. Use the game phase detection (from 'Implement Game Phase Detection Mechanism') to decide whether to register to internalRegistry (static) or dynamicEntries (dynamic). 2. Ensure that all registration paths (both static and dynamic) return a cn.solarmoon.spark_core.common.holder.DeferredHolder<T>.

relatedFiles.description: The target return type for registrations.

tasks.implementationGuide: Define the primary registration method(s) in DynamicAwareRegistry. Inside these methods, query the game phase. If static registration is allowed, call internalRegistry.register(...). If this returns a Holder.Reference, it must be wrapped or adapted into a DeferredHolder. If dynamic registration is chosen, add to dynamicEntries and create a DeferredHolder that resolves to this dynamic entry. The existing registerDynamic might be refactored or serve as a base.
tasks.verificationCriteria: Registration methods correctly choose static/dynamic paths based on simulated game phases. All registration methods consistently return DeferredHolder<T>. Behavior confirmed via unit tests and debugging.
tasks.analysisResult: Refined plan for DynamicAwareRegistry: Ensure full Registry API compatibility by analyzing NeoForge sources (Registry.java, MappedRegistry.java, BaseMappedRegistry.java). Implement all missing methods in DynamicAwareRegistry.kt. Unify registration logic to be game-phase aware, and ensure all registration paths return DeferredHolder.

tasks.name: Write Comprehensive Unit Tests for DynamicAwareRegistry
tasks.description: Create or update unit tests for DynamicAwareRegistry in src/test/kotlin/cn/solarmoon/spark_core/registry/dynamic/DynamicAwareRegistryTest.kt to cover: 1. All newly implemented Registry interface methods, verifying behavior with both static and dynamic entries. 2. The unified registration logic under different simulated game phases. 3. Correct creation and resolution of DeferredHolder for both static and dynamic registrations. 4. Concurrency scenarios to ensure thread safety.
tasks.implementationGuide: Use a testing framework like JUnit and MockK. Mock the game phase detection mechanism to test different registration paths. Test edge cases, error conditions, and concurrent access patterns for key methods.
tasks.verificationCriteria: All unit tests pass, achieving high code coverage for the new and modified logic in DynamicAwareRegistry. Test report reviewed.
tasks.analysisResult: Refined plan for DynamicAwareRegistry: Ensure full Registry API compatibility by analyzing NeoForge sources (Registry.java, MappedRegistry.java, BaseMappedRegistry.java). Implement all missing methods in DynamicAwareRegistry.kt. Unify registration logic to be game-phase aware, and ensure all registration paths return DeferredHolder.

tasks.name: 实现核心 Holder.Reference 检索方法
tasks.description: 在 DynamicAwareRegistry.kt 中实现 getHolder(id: Int)、getHolder(location: ResourceLocation)、getHolder(key: ResourceKey<T>)、getHolderOrThrow(key: ResourceKey<T>) 和 getAny()。这些方法需正确处理静态与动态条目，并返回 Registry 接口指定的 Optional<Holder.Reference<T>> 或 Holder.Reference<T>。
tasks.notes: 为动态条目创建合适的 Holder.Reference 实例是关键。

relatedFiles.description: 实现核心 Holder.Reference 检索方法

tasks.implementationGuide: 1. 对于 getHolder(id): 检查 dynamicIdToKey 和 dynamicEntries。若找到动态条目，为其创建或获取 Holder.Reference。否则，委托给 staticRegistry.getHolder(id)。 2. 对于 getHolder(location) 和 getHolder(key): 类似地，先检查 dynamicEntries。 3. 对于 getHolderOrThrow(key): 基于 getHolder(key) 实现。 4. 对于 getAny(): 优先从 dynamicEntries 中选择一个条目并返回其 Holder.Reference；若动态为空，则委托给 staticRegistry。 5. 所有操作需使用读锁保证线程安全。
tasks.verificationCriteria: 单元测试验证这些方法能为动态和静态条目返回正确的 Holder.Reference 实例，覆盖条目存在于动态、静态或均不存在等场景。
tasks.analysisResult: Implement Missing Registry Methods in DynamicAwareRegistry: Based on the analysis from 'Analyze NeoForge Registry API & Behavior', implement all missing net.minecraft.core.Registry interface methods in cn.solarmoon.spark_core.registry.dynamic.DynamicAwareRegistry.kt. Methods should correctly delegate to internalRegistry or operate on dynamicEntries as appropriate, ensuring thread safety using the existing ReadWriteLock.
tasks.summary: 在 DynamicAwareRegistry.kt 中成功实现了 getHolder(id), getHolder(location), getHolder(key), getHolderOrThrow(key) 和 getAny() 方法。这些方法现在能够为动态条目正确创建和返回 DeferredHolder 实例，并在找不到动态条目时委托给静态注册表。已添加必要的导入并确保了线程安全。

tasks.name: 实现 Holder 创建与包装方法
tasks.description: 在 DynamicAwareRegistry.kt 中实现 createIntrusiveHolder(T value) 和 wrapAsHolder(T value) 方法。这些方法需要为动态或静态条目正确创建 Holder.Reference<T> 实例。

relatedFiles.description: 实现 Holder 创建与包装方法

tasks.implementationGuide: 1. createIntrusiveHolder(value): 若 value 是动态条目（通过 dynamicValueToKey检查），则为其创建特定的 Holder.Reference。否则，委托给 staticRegistry.createIntrusiveHolder(value)。 2. wrapAsHolder(value): 逻辑与 createIntrusiveHolder 类似。 3. 确保线程安全。
tasks.verificationCriteria: 单元测试确保为动态和静态值正确创建 Holder.Reference。
tasks.analysisResult: Implement Missing Registry Methods in DynamicAwareRegistry: Based on the analysis from 'Analyze NeoForge Registry API & Behavior', implement all missing net.minecraft.core.Registry interface methods in cn.solarmoon.spark_core.registry.dynamic.DynamicAwareRegistry.kt. Methods should correctly delegate to internalRegistry or operate on dynamicEntries as appropriate, ensuring thread safety using the existing ReadWriteLock.
tasks.summary: 已实现 createIntrusiveHolder 和 wrapAsHolder 方法。对于动态条目，它们现在会使用 dynamicValueToKey 查找并通过 Holder.Reference.createStandAlone(this.dynamicOwner, dynamicKey) 创建 Holder；对于未知条目，则委托给 staticRegistry。线程安全已通过读锁保证。

tasks.name: 实现标签管理方法
tasks.description: 在 DynamicAwareRegistry.kt 中实现 getTag(TagKey<T>)、getOrCreateTag(TagKey<T>)、getTagOrEmpty(TagKey<T>)、getTags()、getTagNames()、resetTags() 和 bindTags(Map)。确保标签系统同时支持动态和静态条目。
tasks.notes: 可能需要为动态条目维护独立的标签数据结构，并与静态注册表的标签合并。
tasks.implementationGuide: 1. 设计动态条目标签的存储（例如 Map<TagKey<T>, MutableList<Holder<T>>>）。 2. getOrCreateTag, getTag, getTagOrEmpty: 优先检查动态标签，然后是静态标签；结果可能需要合并或创建自定义的 HolderSet.Named。 3. getTags, getTagNames: 合并动态与静态的结果。 4. bindTags: 应用于动态标签并委托给静态注册表。 5. resetTags: 清理动态标签并委托。 6. 保证线程安全。
tasks.verificationCriteria: 单元测试覆盖涉及动态条目、静态条目及其组合的标签创建、检索和绑定操作。
tasks.analysisResult: Implement Missing Registry Methods in DynamicAwareRegistry: Based on the analysis from 'Analyze NeoForge Registry API & Behavior', implement all missing net.minecraft.core.Registry interface methods in cn.solarmoon.spark_core.registry.dynamic.DynamicAwareRegistry.kt. Methods should correctly delegate to internalRegistry or operate on dynamicEntries as appropriate, ensuring thread safety using the existing ReadWriteLock.
tasks.summary: 已实现所有标签管理方法 (getTag, getOrCreateTag, getTagOrEmpty, getTags, getTagNames, bindTags, resetTags)。动态标签存储在 dynamicTagToHolders 中。方法会适当地处理动态和静态标签，并在需要时（如 getTags）提供合并视图。bindTags 会区分动态和静态 Holder 并分别处理。线程安全通过读写锁保证。

tasks.name: 实现 NeoForge 扩展方法
tasks.description: 在 DynamicAwareRegistry.kt 中实现 NeoForge 特有的扩展方法，如 addAlias(...)、addCallback(...)、getDataMap(...)、getData(...)、holderOwner()、doesSync()、getMaxId()，并确保它们能正确处理动态条目。

relatedFiles.description: 实现 NeoForge 扩展方法

tasks.implementationGuide: 1. addAlias, addCallback: 决定是否适用于动态条目。若是，则内部存储；否则委托。 2. getDataMap, getData: 优先查询动态存储，若未找到则委托。 3. holderOwner(): 通常返回 this。 4. doesSync(): 委托，除非动态条目影响同步行为。 5. getMaxId(): 考虑 nextDynamicId。 6. 保证线程安全。
tasks.verificationCriteria: 单元测试验证别名解析、回调调用、DataMap 访问在包含动态条目时的正确性。
tasks.analysisResult: Implement Missing Registry Methods in DynamicAwareRegistry: Based on the analysis from 'Analyze NeoForge Registry API & Behavior', implement all missing net.minecraft.core.Registry interface methods in cn.solarmoon.spark_core.registry.dynamic.DynamicAwareRegistry.kt. Methods should correctly delegate to internalRegistry or operate on dynamicEntries as appropriate, ensuring thread safety using the existing ReadWriteLock.
tasks.summary:
已在 DynamicAwareRegistry.kt 中实现 NeoForge 特有的扩展方法：addAlias, addCallback (两个重载), getData (两个重载), holderOwner, doesSync, getMaxId。
- addAlias 和 addCallback 目前委托给 staticRegistry。
- getData(key, type) 会优先查询动态存储 (dynamicDataMapValues)，然后委托。
- getData(type) 直接委托。
- holderOwner 返回 this.dynamicOwner。
- doesSync 委托。
- getMaxId 结合动态ID和静态ID的最大值。
所有操作均考虑了线程安全。

tasks.name: 审查并完成其余核心 Registry 方法
tasks.description: 审查并完成 DynamicAwareRegistry.kt 中其余 Registry 接口方法的实现，包括各种检索方法、集合视图、生命周期管理、Codecs 和 Lookup 方法。确保它们能正确处理动态和静态条目，并保证线程安全。

relatedFiles.description: 审查并完成其余核心 Registry 方法

tasks.implementationGuide: 1. 检索方法 (如 getOptional, getOrThrow, byId): 基于已实现的 get 或 getId 构建，并处理动态/静态情况。 2. 集合视图 (keySet, entrySet, stream, iterator, size, holders): 确保正确合并和反映组合状态。 3. 生命周期 (freeze, isFrozen, registrationInfo, registryLifecycle): freeze 方法可能需要选项来冻结动态部分；registryLifecycle 可能需要聚合两部分状态。 4. Codecs 和 Lookups (holderByNameCodec, asLookup): 确保它们能与组合的注册表视图一同工作。 5. 保证线程安全。
tasks.verificationCriteria: 针对所有剩余方法编写全面的单元测试，覆盖各种涉及动态和静态条目的场景。
tasks.analysisResult: Implement Missing Registry Methods in DynamicAwareRegistry: Based on the analysis from 'Analyze NeoForge Registry API & Behavior', implement all missing net.minecraft.core.Registry interface methods in cn.solarmoon.spark_core.registry.dynamic.DynamicAwareRegistry.kt. Methods should correctly delegate to internalRegistry or operate on dynamicEntries as appropriate, ensuring thread safety using the existing ReadWriteLock.
